channel.title: NeuralCline
channel.description: Session safety layer for AI coding agents

item.title: NeuralCline v1.0.1 Launch — Session Safety Layer
item.description: NeuralCline is now live on GitHub! Five layers of crash protection, 21-point diagnostic, timing intelligence, and self-learning organism.

item.title: NeuralCline: The Architecture Behind the Session Safety Layer
item.description: How we solved the Cline session crash problem at the architectural level: three compute engines, five safety layers, and automatic shell-level hang detection.
